overview: A premium landing page for Purple Crib Studios, a Lagos-based Mediatech company established in 2013. Features a bold hero, services showcase for Photography and Business Solutions, an About section, and a Contact form — all styled with a modern purple-accented dark aesthetic.
features: Bold animated hero section with brand tagline and dual CTAs
Photography services showcase: weddings, corporate headshots, product shoots, model shoots, events, 360° VR tours
Business Solutions showcase: AI social media marketing, Google My Business, WhatsApp Business, ERP for SMEs
About section with brand story and 2013 founding narrative
Contact form with service interest dropdown and success feedback
Sticky navigation with mobile hamburger menu
Purple-accented dark/modern theme with smooth animations
Fully responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop
